recent_projects.name: TreeTime
recent_projects.summary: TreeTime is a to-do list manager, test report tool, project manager, family ancestry editor,mind-mapping tool, etc. Using TreeTime you can categorise and organise any data in tree structures.You can define several trees, each with a different structure, on the same data. You can use functions(sums, ratios and means) recursively up the branches of a tree.
recent_projects.author: Jacob Kanev
